promptTemplate: You are in the repository root for this benchmark.
Use the Obsidian CLI that is already available in this repo for vault inspection and vault writes. Prefer `./bin/obsidian-dev obsidian ...` commands when you need vault data or file edits.
Return only JSON matching the provided schema. Do not wrap the JSON in markdown fences.
Task: append the exact checklist line `{{golden.patchExisting.appendedLine}}` to the markdown note at `{{golden.patchExisting.path}}`. Do not modify any other file. Return the edited path.
